scripts.deploy:acme-demo: node scripts/set-customer.mjs acme-demo && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.acme-demo.jsonc --secrets-file .dev.vars
scripts.deploy:worldpay: node scripts/set-customer.mjs worldpay && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.worldpay.jsonc --secrets-file .dev.vars
scripts.deploy:newell: node scripts/set-customer.mjs newell && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.newell.jsonc --secrets-file .dev.vars
